title: Hydrogen End-Use: Power, Heat, Mobility, and Industry
caption: Parameter study for Hydrogen End-Use: Power, Heat, Mobility, and Industry.
description: The chapter parameter study converts the demand side of the hydrogen value chain into a small sweep with visible KPIs: H2 demand by sector, end-use efficiency, blending limits, fuel-quality status, and value-chain matching. The values are screening outputs intended to demonstrate the notebook structure and discussion pattern.
discussion: The parameter study shows how the demand side of the hydrogen value chain responds when the controlling parameter changes. The important result is not a single base-case value; it is the shape of the response and the point where H2 demand by sector, end-use efficiency, blending limits, fuel-quality status, and value-chain matching begin to trade against margin or cost.
calculation_basis: Chapter-specific screening calculations for the demand side of the hydrogen value chain, normalized to the KPIs: H2 demand by sector, end-use efficiency, blending limits, fuel-quality status, and value-chain matching.
study_basis: IEA hydrogen route context and the cited process-design references define the interpretation envelope for the normalized indices.
source_labels: IEA Global Hydrogen Review 2023, Chemical engineering design reference
